message:
refactor: add rich terminal rendering and debug tracing instrumentation

Show command enhancements:
- Split show_human() into show_human_rich() (panel-based) and
  show_human_plain() (text-based) with should_use_rich_for_show()
  adaptive selection
- Add skill_detail_panel(), key_value_table(), and warning_panel()
  rendering functions for structured terminal output
- Display metadata, provenance (git remote/commit/hash), deprecation
  warnings, dependencies, and stats in rich format

Search command observability:
- Add tracing::debug! instrumentation at search start, render phase,
  and completion with elapsed-time metrics
- Replace console::style colored output with plain text formatting

Dependency updates:
- Update bitflags 2.10.0 -> 2.11.0, windows-sys, and transitive deps
  (addr2line, backtrace added for improved error context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
